name: Kanape Me Antsougia (Anchovy Canape)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place an anchovy fillet lengthwise down the center of each piece of bread.
2. On one side of the anchovy fillet, place a few chopped capers on top of the hard cooked egg whites.
3. On the other side of the anchovy fillet, place the chopped beets topped with the chopped olives.
